name: PointCloud
summary: Represents a collection of coordinates with optional normal vectors and colors.

constructors.name: PointCloud()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PointCloud class that is empty.

constructors.name: PointCloud(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PointCloud class, copying the content from a set of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: A list or an array of Point3d, or any object that implements IEnumerable<T>.

constructors.name: PointCloud(PointCloud)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PointCloud class, copying (Merge) the content of another point cloud.

constructors.name: PointCloud(SerializationInfo, StreamingContext)
constructors.summary: Binds with the Rhino default serializer to support object persistence.

params.name: context
params.doc: The source and destination of the stream.

methods.name: Add(Point3d)
methods.summary: Append a new point to the end of the list.

methods.name: Add(Point3d, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public void Add(Point3d point, Vector3d normal)
methods.summary: Append a new point to the end of the list.

methods.name: Add(Point3d, Color)
methods.signature: public void Add(Point3d point, Color color)
methods.summary: Append a new point to the end of the list.

methods.name: Add(Point3d, Vector3d, Color)
methods.signature: public void Add(Point3d point, Vector3d normal, Color color)
methods.summary: Append a new point to the end of the list.

methods.name: Add(Point3d, Vector3d, Color, Double)
methods.signature: public void Add(Point3d point, Vector3d normal, Color color, double value)
methods.summary: Append a new point to the end of the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: Extra value of new point. An extra value can be used to store a user-defined value, such as intensity.

methods.name: AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
methods.summary: Appends a collection of points to this point cloud.

methods.name: AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d>, IEnumerable<Vector3d>)
methods.signature: public void AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, IEnumerable<Vector3d> normals)
methods.summary: Appends a collection of points and normal vectors to this point cloud.

throws.when: thrown if points and normals have differing numbers of elements

methods.name: AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d>, IEnumerable<Color>)
methods.signature: public void AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, IEnumerable<Color> colors)
methods.summary: Appends a collection of points and normal vectors to this point cloud.

methods.name: AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d>, IEnumerable<Vector3d>, IEnumerable<Color>)
methods.signature: public void AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, IEnumerable<Vector3d> normals, IEnumerable<Color> colors)
methods.summary: Appends a collection of points, normal vectors, and colors to this point cloud.

methods.name: AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d>, IEnumerable<Vector3d>, IEnumerable<Color>, IEnumerable<Double>)
methods.signature: public void AddRange(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, IEnumerable<Vector3d> normals, IEnumerable<Color> colors, IEnumerable<double> values)
methods.summary: Appends a collection of points, normal vectors, colors, and extra values to this point cloud.

params.name: values
params.doc: Exta point values to append. Extra values can be used to store a user-defined values, such as intensity.

methods.name: AppendNew
methods.summary: Appends a new PointCloudItem to the end of this point cloud.

returns.doc: The newly appended item.

methods.name: AsReadOnlyListOfPoints
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator and list indexer over point cloud locations.

returns.doc: The read-only list. This is a reference to the present point cloud.

methods.name: ClearColors
methods.summary: Destroys the color information in this point cloud.

methods.name: ClearHiddenFlags
methods.summary: Destroys the hidden flag information in this point cloud.

methods.name: ClearNormals
methods.summary: Destroys the normal vector information in this point cloud.

methods.name: ClearPointValues
methods.summary: Destroys the extra value information in this point cloud. Extra values can be used to store a user-defined values, such as intensity.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.summary: Returns index of the closest point in the point cloud to a given test point.

returns.doc: Index of point in the point cloud on success. -1 on failure.

methods.name: ComponentIndex
methods.summary: If this piece of geometry is a component in something larger, like a BrepEdge in a Brep, then this function returns the component index.

returns.doc: This object's component index. If this object is not a sub-piece of a larger geometric entity, then the returned index has m_type = ComponentIndex.InvalidType and m_index = -1.

methods.name: ConstructConstObject
methods.signature: protected void ConstructConstObject(Object parentObject, int subobjectIndex)
methods.summary: Assigns a parent object and a sub-object index to this.

methods.name: CreateContourCurves(Point3d, Point3d, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public Curve[] CreateContourCurves(Point3d contourStart, Point3d contourEnd, double interval, double absoluteTolerance)
methods.summary: Creates a planar curves by intersecting a plane with a point cloud.

params.name: contourStart
params.doc: Start point for vector that is normal to contour plane.

params.name: contourEnd
params.doc: End point for vector that is normal to contour plane.

params.name: interval
params.doc: he interval or distance between contours.

returns.doc: The intersection curves if successful, an empty array if unsuccessful.

methods.name: CreateContourCurves(Point3d, Point3d, Double, Double, Double, Double, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Double)
methods.signature: public Curve[] CreateContourCurves(Point3d startPoint, Point3d endPoint, double interval, double absoluteTolerance, double maxDistance, double minDistance, bool openCurves, bool createSpline, bool createPolyline, double fitTolerance)
methods.summary: Creates a planar curves by intersecting a plane with a point cloud.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: Start point for vector that is normal to contour plane.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: End point for vector that is normal to contour plane.

params.name: interval
params.doc: he interval or distance between contours.

params.name: maxDistance
params.doc: Maximum distance to plane. The thickness of the "slab" around the plane from which sample points are taken. Those sample points are projected to the section plane and a polyline is found that connects them. This distance depends on the size of the point cloud and the spacing of the points.

params.name: minDistance
params.doc: Minimum distance between points. A threshold for the minimum spacing between adjacent sample points. If there are points closer than that, some are not used.

params.name: openCurves
params.doc: True for open, false for closed.

params.name: createSpline
params.doc: Creates a smooth curve. You can create both a curve and a polyline.

params.name: createPolyline
params.doc: Creates a polyline. You can create both a curve and a polyline.

params.name: fitTolerance
params.doc: The tolerance used to fit the curve through the polyline.

returns.doc: The intersection curves if successful, an empty array if unsuccessful.

methods.name: CreateFromMesh
methods.summary: Creates a point cloud from a mesh.

params.name: mesh
params.doc: Mesh to copy vertices, vertex normals, and colors.

returns.doc: A point cloud if successful, otherwise null.

methods.name: CreateSectionCurve(Plane, Double)
methods.signature: public Curve[] CreateSectionCurve(Plane plane, double absoluteTolerance)
methods.summary: Creates planar curves by intersecting a plane with a point cloud.

returns.doc: The intersection curves if successful, an empty array if unsuccessful.

methods.name: CreateSectionCurve(Plane, Double, Double, Double, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Double)
methods.signature: public Curve[] CreateSectionCurve(Plane plane, double absoluteTolerance, double maxDistance, double minDistance, bool openCurves, bool createSpline, bool createPolyline, double fitTolerance)
methods.summary: Creates a planar curve by intersecting a plane with a point cloud.

params.name: maxDistance
params.doc: Maximum distance to plane. The thickness of the "slab" around the plane from which sample points are taken. Those sample points are projected to the section plane and a polyline is found that connects them. This distance depends on the size of the point cloud and the spacing of the points.

params.name: minDistance
params.doc: Minimum distance between points. A threshold for the minimum spacing between adjacent sample points. If there are points closer than that, some are not used.

params.name: openCurves
params.doc: True for open, false for closed.

params.name: createSpline
params.doc: Creates a smooth curve. You can create both a curve and a polyline.

params.name: createPolyline
params.doc: Creates a polyline. You can create both a curve and a polyline.

params.name: fitTolerance
params.doc: The tolerance used to fit the curve through the polyline.

returns.doc: The intersection curves if successful, an empty array if unsuccessful.

methods.name: DataCRC
methods.summary: Returns a CRC calculated from the information that defines the object. This CRC can be used as a quick way to see if two objects are not identical.

returns.doc: CRC of the information the defines the object.

methods.name: DeleteAllUserStrings
methods.summary: (Inherited from GeometryBase.)

methods.name: DeleteUserString
methods.summary: (Inherited from GeometryBase.)

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.GeometryBase.DeleteUserString(System.String)"]

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: Overridden in order to destroy local display cache information

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: Duplicate
methods.summary: Constructs a deep (full) copy of this object.

returns.doc: An object of the same type as this, with the same properties and behavior.

methods.name: DuplicateShallow
methods.summary: Constructs a light copy of this object. By "light", it is meant that the same underlying data is used until something is done to attempt to change it. For example, you could have a shallow copy of a very heavy mesh object and the same underlying data will be used when doing things like inspecting the number of faces on the mesh. If you modify the location of one of the mesh vertices, the shallow copy will create a full duplicate of the underlying mesh data and the shallow copy will become a deep copy.

returns.doc: An object of the same type as this object. This behavior is overridden by implementing classes.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Boolean)
methods.summary: Bounding box solver. Gets the world axis aligned bounding box for the geometry.

params.name: accurate
params.doc: If true, a physically accurate bounding box will be computed. If not, a bounding box estimate will be computed. For some geometry types there is no difference between the estimate and the accurate bounding box. Estimated bounding boxes can be computed much (much) faster than accurate (or "tight") bounding boxes. Estimated bounding boxes are always similar to or larger than accurate bounding boxes.

returns.doc: The bounding box of the geometry in world coordinates or BoundingBox.Empty if not bounding box could be found.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Plane)
methods.summary: Aligned Bounding box solver. Gets the plane aligned bounding box.

returns.doc: A BoundingBox in plane coordinates.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Transform)
methods.summary: Aligned Bounding box solver. Gets the world axis aligned bounding box for the transformed geometry.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation to apply to object prior to the BoundingBox computation. The geometry itself is not modified.

returns.doc: The accurate bounding box of the transformed geometry in world coordinates or BoundingBox.Empty if not bounding box could be found.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Plane, Box)
methods.signature: public BoundingBox GetBoundingBox(Plane plane, out Box worldBox)
methods.summary: Aligned Bounding box solver. Gets the plane aligned bounding box.

returns.doc: A BoundingBox in plane coordinates.

methods.name: GetColors
methods.summary: Copy all the point colors in this point cloud to an array.

returns.doc: An array containing all the colors in this point cloud.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that allows to modify each point cloud point.

returns.doc: A instance of IEnumerator<T>.

methods.name: GetNormals
methods.summary: Copy all the normal vectors in this point cloud to an array.

returns.doc: An array containing all the normals in this point cloud.

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: GetPoints
methods.summary: Copy all the point coordinates in this point cloud to an array.

returns.doc: An array containing all the points in this point cloud.

methods.name: GetPointValues
methods.summary: Copy all the extra point values in this point cloud to an array. Extra values can be used to store a user-defined value, such as intensity.

returns.doc: An array containing all the extra point values in this point cloud.

methods.name: GetRandomSubsample(UInt32)
methods.summary: Returns a random subsample of a point cloud.

params.name: numberOfPoints
params.doc: The number of points the new point cloud should contain.

returns.doc: A subsample of this point cloud if success, null otherwise.

methods.name: GetRandomSubsample(UInt32, CancellationToken, IProgress<Double>)
methods.signature: public PointCloud GetRandomSubsample(uint numberOfPoints, CancellationToken cancelToken, IProgress<double> progress)
methods.summary: Returns a random subsample of a point cloud.

params.name: numberOfPoints
params.doc: The number of points the new point cloud should contain.

returns.doc: A subsample of this point cloud if success, null otherwise.

methods.name: GetUnsafeLock
methods.summary: Allows the developer to obtain unsafe pointers to the underlying unmanaged data structures of the PointCloud.
methods.remarks: The lock implements the IDisposable interface, and one call of its Dispose() or ReleaseUnsafeLock(PointCloudUnsafeLock) will update the data structure as required. This can be achieved with a using statement (Using in Vb.Net).

params.name: writable
params.doc: true if user will need to write onto the structure. false otherwise.

returns.doc: A lock that needs to be released.

methods.name: GetUserString
methods.summary: Gets user string from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve the string.

returns.doc: string associated with the key if successful. null if no key was found.

methods.name: GetUserStrings
methods.summary: Gets a copy of all (user key string, user value string) pairs attached to this geometry.

returns.doc: A new collection.

methods.signature: public void InsertRange(int index, IEnumerable<Point3d> points)

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: MakeDeformable
methods.summary: If possible, converts the object into a form that can be accurately modified with "squishy" transformations like projections, shears, an non-uniform scaling.

returns.doc: false if object cannot be converted to a deformable object. true if object was already deformable or was converted into a deformable object.

methods.name: MemoryEstimate
methods.summary: Computes an estimate of the number of bytes that this object is using in memory.

returns.doc: An estimated memory footprint.

methods.name: Merge
methods.summary: Merges, or appends, a specified point cloud into this one.

params.name: other
params.doc: PointCloud to merge with this one.

methods.name: NonConstOperation
methods.summary: Destroy cache handle

methods.name: OnSwitchToNonConst
methods.summary: Is called when a non-constant operation occurs.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.summary: Returns the location of the point at a specific index.

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.PointCloud.PointAt(System.Int32)"]

methods.name: ReleaseUnsafeLock
methods.summary: Updates the PointCloud data with the information that was stored via the PointCloudUnsafeLock.

params.name: pointCloudData
params.doc: The data that will be unlocked.

methods.name: RemoveAt
methods.summary: Remove the point at the given index.

methods.name: RemoveRange
methods.summary: Removes points at given indices.

params.name: indices
params.doc: An array of indices of the points to remove.

returns.doc: The number of points removed from the point cloud.

methods.name: Rotate
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angleRadians, Vector3d rotationAxis, Point3d rotationCenter)
methods.summary: Rotates the object about the specified axis. A positive rotation angle results in a counter-clockwise rotation about the axis (right hand rule).

params.name: rotationAxis
params.doc: Direction of the axis of rotation.

params.name: rotationCenter
params.doc: Point on the axis of rotation.

returns.doc: true if geometry successfully rotated.

methods.name: Scale
methods.summary: Scales the object by the specified factor. The scale is centered at the origin.

returns.doc: true if geometry successfully scaled.

methods.name: SetUserString
methods.signature: public bool SetUserString(string key, string value)
methods.summary: Attach a user string (key,value combination) to this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve this string.

returns.doc: true on success.

methods.summary: Returns a ShrinkWrap mesh from this point cloud object.

methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Runtime.CommonObject.ToJSON(Rhino.FileIO.SerializationOptions)"]

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms the geometry. If the input Transform has a SimilarityType of OrientationReversing, you may want to consider flipping the transformed geometry after calling this function when it makes sense. For example, you may want to call Flip() on a Brep after transforming it.

returns.doc: true if geometry successfully transformed.

methods.name: Translate(Vector3d)
methods.summary: Translates the object along the specified vector.

returns.doc: true if geometry successfully translated.

methods.name: Translate(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool Translate(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Translates the object along the specified vector.

returns.doc: true if geometry successfully translated.

properties.name: ContainsColors
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the points in this point cloud have colors assigned to them.

properties.name: ContainsHiddenFlags
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the points in this point cloud have hidden flags assigned to them.

properties.name: ContainsNormals
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the points in this point cloud have normals assigned to them.

properties.name: ContainsPointValues
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the points in this point cloud have extra values assigned to them. Extra values can be used to store a user-defined values, such as intensity.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of points in this point cloud.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: HasBrepForm
properties.summary: Returns true if the Brep.TryConvertBrep function will be successful for this object

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: HiddenPointCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of points that have their Hidden flag set.

properties.name: IsDeformable
properties.summary: true if object can be accurately modified with "squishy" transformations like projections, shears, and non-uniform scaling.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsShallowDuplicate
properties.summary: Is this instance a 'shallow copy'. Shallow copies are no different than regular instances with the exception that they will convert to complete independent 'deep' copies if a non const operation is perform on the instance (something that mutates the internal data)

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the item at the given index.

properties.name: ObjectType
properties.summary: Useful for switch statements that need to differentiate between basic object types like points, curves, surfaces, and so on.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UserStringCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of user strings.
